name: Crab Delights Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen oriental style vegetables with seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crab delights, frozen oriental style vegetables with seasoning, garlic powder, and ground ginger in a bowl.
2. Heat the mixture according to the directions on the package of the frozen vegetables.
3. Stir until heated through.
4. Season with soy sauce, if desired.
